description_long: This house features a modern design with a mix of stone and wood exterior walls, complemented by a dark gable roof and several flat-roofed extensions. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and includes a well-maintained front lawn with mature trees flanking the entrance. Large windows and skylights are present, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessed by a paved walkway, and is partially sheltered by the roof overhang. The rear of the house includes a private garden area, bordered by the same wooden fencing, and additional windows and doors for backyard access. The overall structure is compact yet spacious, with a blend of traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern house with a dark gable roof, stone and wood exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, front lawn, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, multiple windows, and the fenced yard extending to the back.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the backyard, additional windows, and a flat-roofed extension.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear fence, garden area, and a row of windows under the roofline.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, flanked by trees and accessed via a paved walkway
